  • Method Details

    • getImageDescriptor

      public static org.eclipse.jface.resource.ImageDescriptor getImageDescriptor(String path)
      Returns an image descriptor for the image file within the Event-B UI Plugin at the given plug-in relative path

      Parameters:
      path - relative path of the image within this Event-B UI Plugin
      Returns:
      the image descriptor, or null if the image could not be found

    • getImageDescriptor

      public static org.eclipse.jface.resource.ImageDescriptor getImageDescriptor(String pluginID, String path)
      Returns an image descriptor for the image file at the given plug-in and the relative path within the plugin

      Parameters:
      path - relative path of the image
      Returns:
      the image descriptor, or null if the image could not be found

    • initializeImageRegistry

      public static void initializeImageRegistry(org.eclipse.jface.resource.ImageRegistry registry)
      Initialialise the image registry. Additional image should be added here

      Parameters:
      registry - The image registry

    • registerImage

      public static void registerImage(org.eclipse.jface.resource.ImageRegistry registry, String key, String path)
      Register an image with the image registry

      Parameters:
      registry - the image registry
      key - the key to retrieve the image later
      path - the path to the location of the image file within this Event-B UI plugin

    • registerImage

      public static void registerImage(org.eclipse.jface.resource.ImageRegistry registry, String key, String pluginID, String path)
      Register an image with the image registry

      Parameters:
      registry - the image reigstry
      key - the key to retrieve the image later
      pluginID - the id of the plugin where the image can be found
      path - the path to the location of the image file within the plugin

    • getImage

      public static org.eclipse.swt.graphics.Image getImage(String key)
      Get an image from the image registry with a given key

      Parameters:
      key - a key (String)
      Returns:
      an image associated with the input key or null if it does not exist

    • getRodinImage

      public static org.eclipse.swt.graphics.Image getRodinImage(IRodinElement element)
      Getting an image corresponding to a Rodin element.

      Parameters:
      element - A Rodin element
      Returns:
      The image for displaying corresponding to the input element

    • getProofTreeNodeImage

      public static org.eclipse.swt.graphics.Image getProofTreeNodeImage(IProofTreeNode node)
      Get the image corresponding to a proof tree node

      Parameters:
      node - a proof tree node
      Returns:
      the image corresponding to the input node

    • getPRSequentImage

      public static org.eclipse.swt.graphics.Image getPRSequentImage(IPSStatus status)
      Get the image corresponding with a PRSequent
      Parameters:
      status - a PRSequent
      Returns:
      the image corresponding to the input sequent

    • getImageDescriptor

      public static org.eclipse.jface.resource.ImageDescriptor getImageDescriptor(IRodinElement element)

    • getImage
